title: EdgarTools Platform
scope_summary: Developer guide and onboarding reference for the EdgarTools data platform, covering architecture, data layers, ETL pipeline phases, Docker image management, and development commands. Serves as the primary navigation and operational context document for contributors working in this repo.
locked_decisions: bootstrap-batch must NOT be in GOLD_AFFECTING_COMMANDS (enforced in warehouse_orchestrator.py:79)
gold-refresh must be in GOLD_AFFECTING_COMMANDS — sole gold builder in the phased pipeline
SNOWFLAKE_RUN_MANIFEST_TASK must be STARTED in EDGARTOOLS_GOLD
silver_mdm_gold map MUST pass --artifact-policy skip to bootstrap-batch
SEC filing artifacts are additive and immutable after capture — skip by default, re-fetch only with explicit --force flag
Use AWS ECR only for deployable images — do not add Azure Container Registry, Azure SDK, ODBC, or Azure deployment steps
Always use uv for Python dependency management — never bare pip or bare dbt
On macOS use Colima as the local Docker daemon; do not introduce another container build/runtime stack
key_requirements: edgartools PyPI package >= 5.29.0 required (not a local path dependency)
Warehouse loaders must skip already-loaded SEC files by default
bootstrap_phased Step Function is the canonical way to load >=10 companies
Do not run bootstrap-next locally for large batches
When edgartools version is bumped, run batch scripts in scripts/batch/ to smoke-test parsing
key_constraints: bootstrap-batch must NOT be in GOLD_AFFECTING_COMMANDS
silver_mdm_gold map MUST pass --artifact-policy skip to bootstrap-batch
Use uv (not pip) for all Python dependency management
Use Colima (not Docker Desktop or other runtimes) on macOS
ECR tags must be MUTABLE for :dev to be overwritten
Ownership import pattern: from edgar.ownership import Ownership — do not change without checking changelog
